reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2s4NFMyUlNSV1pLWDBGNVltdFFkMnhtVkZWdVQxRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a tomar un café el sábado a la noche, sin esperar mucho por ser estación de servicio. Me atendió Nicolás, que me ayudó con mucha paciencia a instalarme y pagar con la app YPF, conseguí descontar puntos en mi compra. Hace mucho no tomaba un café de buena calidad. Una experiencia que te invita a volver. Me quedé pensando en hacerme socio

(Translated by Google)
I went for a coffee Saturday night, and since it's a gas station, I didn't have to wait long. Nicolás served me and patiently helped me get settled and pay with the YPF app. I even got points deducted from my purchase. It had been a long time since I'd had such a good coffee. It was an experience that makes you want to come back. I'm already thinking about becoming a member.

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia!, muchas gracias por tu comentario y calificación, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.

reviews.comment:
Pareciera que están haciendo algo raro en cuanto al pago, según y que el QR de Mercado pago no anda, Y mandaron a transferir a un alias que se llama Beracar SRL por las dudas aviso porque había mucho cola por lo mismo, no dieron el ticket de comprobante tampoco.

(Translated by Google)
It seems they're doing something strange with the payment, apparently the Mercado Pago QR code isn't working, and they sent a transfer to an alias called Beracar SRL, just in case, I'm letting you know because there was a long line for the same thing, and they didn't give a receipt either.

reviews.comment:
Buenas tardes! Recomiendo ampliamente utilizar los servicios de ypf y aca en esta sucursal! Iba a dar un examen en UBA DERECHO super importante y estaba corta de tiempo; Adrian Pollozatto me atendio y fue GENIAL!! Y aprobe!! Pollozatto TRAE SUERTE!!!!!! GRACIASSSSSSSSSSSSSSS

(Translated by Google)
Good afternoon! I highly recommend using YPF services, especially at this branch! I had a super important exam at the University of Buenos Aires Law School and I was short on time; Adrian Pollozatto helped me and he was FANTASTIC!! And I passed!! Pollozatto BRINGS LUCKY GOODNESS!!!!!! THANK YOU SO MUCH
